features: ❤30X Magnifying Mirror: 30X magnification is unimaginable, you need to be 3 inches away from the mirror to start using it, if you still can't see you need to get a little closer; in addition you can use it to check the blemishes after makeup, you can also use it to get rid of blackheads and messy eyebrows and beards, both men and women are very practical.

❤Compact Mirror: 3.5-inch diameter round mirror, weighing 1.5 ounces, lightweight and portable enough to carry in a pocket, purse or handbag and can be used as a magnified makeup mirror or countertop vanity mirror.
❤Easy to Use: This magnifying glass has two removable suction cups with strong suction power, just remove the smooth surface of the dust and water stains can be well attached to the surface.

❤Stainless Steel Tweezers: stainless steel tweezers, wear-resistant, not easy to oxidize corrosion, with a magnifying mirror, can be used to clip away eyebrows eyelashes whiskers and white hairs on the face.
❤Attention: You need to hold it about 3 inches from your eyes first. If you still see a distorted image, very slowly move it away from your face until you see a clear reflection.
❤Target Users: Suitable for people with blurred vision and those over 40 years of age.
